name: Reversinglabs TitaniumCloud v2
description: App integrates with ReversingLabs TitaniumCloud APIs delivering targeted file and malware intelligence for threat identification, analysis, intelligence development, and threat hunting services

parameters.description: Time from which to retrieve results onwards. Needs to be less than 90 days from now

parameters.description: Number of results to be returned in one page, maximum value is 1000

actions.description: List User Overrides

parameters.description: Optional parameter used for pagination

actions.name: Get List User Overrides Aggregated
actions.description: Returns a list of overrides that the user has made

parameters.name: max_results
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to be returned in the list

actions.name: Network Reputation User Override
actions.description: Network Reputation User Override

parameters.name: override_list
parameters.description: List of network locations whose classification needs to be overriden structured in JSON format. Visit documentation for guidance

parameters.name: remove_overrides_list
parameters.description: List of network locations whose classification override needs to be removed structured in JSON format. Visit documentation for guidance

actions.name: File Reputation User Override
actions.description: File Reputation User Override

parameters.name: override_samples
parameters.description: List of samples to override structured in JSON format. Visit documentation for guidance

parameters.name: remove_overrides
parameters.description: List of samples whose classification override needs to be removed structured in JSON format. Visit documentation for guidance

actions.name: List Active File Reputation User Overrides
actions.description: List Active File Reputation User Overrides

parameters.name: hash_type
parameters.description: Required parameter that defines the type of hash

parameters.name: start_hash
parameters.description: When this parameter is present, the API will return up to 1000 hashes with a classification override starting from the start_hash value

actions.name: Customer Daily Usage
actions.description: Check daily usage of ReversingLabs API

parameters.name: date
parameters.description: Specifies the date for which customer usage information should be returned. Users can submit one value per request in the YYYY-MM-DD format.

parameters.name: company
parameters.description: When this parameter is checked, the API will return usage for all accounts within the company

actions.name: Customer Dayrange Usage
actions.description: Check ReversingLabs API usage for specified time range (in days)

parameters.name: from_date
parameters.description: Specifies the from date for which customer usage information should be returned. Users can submit one value per request in the YYYY-MM-DD format

parameters.name: to_date
parameters.description: Specifies the to date for which customer usage information should be returned. Users can submit one value per request in the YYYY-MM-DD format

parameters.name: company
parameters.description: When this parameter is checked, the API will return usage for all accounts within the company

actions.name: Customer Monthly Usage
actions.description: Check Monthly usage of ReversingLabs API

parameters.name: month
parameters.description: Specifies the month for which customer usage information should be returned. Users can submit one value per request in the YYYY-MM format

parameters.name: company
parameters.description: When this parameter is checked, the API will return usage for all accounts within the company

actions.name: Customer Month Range Usage
actions.description: Check ReversingLabs API usage for specified time range (in months)

parameters.name: from_month
parameters.description: Specifies the from date for which customer usage information should be returned. Users can submit one value per request in the YYYY-MM format

parameters.name: to_month
parameters.description: Specifies the to date for which customer usage information should be returned. Users can submit one value per request in the YYYY-MM format

parameters.name: company
parameters.description: When this parameter is checked, the API will return usage for all accounts within the company

actions.name: Customer Yara Api Usage
actions.description: Check Yara usage on ReversingLabs API

parameters.name: format
parameters.description: Specify the response format. Supported values are xml and json. The default is JSON

actions.name: Customer Quota Limits
actions.description: Returns current quota limits for APIs accessible to the authenticated user or users belonging to the authenticated user's company

parameters.name: company
parameters.description: When this parameter is checked, the API will return quota limits for all accounts within the company

actions.name: Get Domain Report
actions.description: API returns threat intelligence data for the submitted domain

parameters.name: domain
parameters.description: The domain for which to retrieve the report

actions.name: Get Domain Downloaded Files
actions.description: Retrieve a list of files downloaded from the submitted domain

parameters.name: domain
parameters.description: The domain for which to retrieve the downloaded files

parameters.name: extended
parameters.description: Chose whether you want extended result data set

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: The number of files to return in the response. Default is 1000

parameters.name: classification
parameters.description: Return only samples that match the requested classification for given domain

actions.name: Get Urls From Domain
actions.description: API provides a list of URLs associated with the requested domain

parameters.name: domain
parameters.description: The domain for which to retrieve the resolved IP addresses

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: String representing a page of results

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: The number of files to return in the response. Default is 1000

actions.name: Get Resolutions From Domain
actions.description: API provides a list of domain-to-IP mappings for the requested domain

parameters.name: domain
parameters.description: The domain for which to retrieve the domain to IP mappings

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: String representing a page of results

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: The number of files to return in the response. Default is 1000

actions.name: Get Related Domains
actions.description: API provides a list of domains that have the same top parent domain as the requested domain

parameters.name: domain
parameters.description: The domain for which to retrieve the downloaded files

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: String representing a page of results

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: The number of files to return in the response. Default is 1000

actions.name: Get Ip Report
actions.description: API returns threat intelligence data for the submitted ip address

parameters.name: ip_address
parameters.description: The IP address for which to retrieve the report

actions.name: Get Ip Downloaded Files
actions.description: Retrieve a list of files downloaded from the submitted IP address

parameters.name: ip_address
parameters.description: The IP address for which to retrieve the downloaded files

parameters.name: extended
parameters.description: Chose whether you want extended result data set

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: String representing a page of results

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: The number of files to return in the response. Default is 1000

parameters.name: classification
parameters.description: Return only samples that match the requested classification for given domain

actions.name: Get Urls From Ip
actions.description: API provides a list of URLs associated with the requested IP address

parameters.name: ip_address
parameters.description: The IP for which to retrieve the domain resolutions

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: String representing a page of results

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: The number of files to return in the response. Default is 1000

actions.name: Get Resolutions From Ip
actions.description: API provides a list of IP-to-domain mappings for the requested IP address

parameters.name: ip_address
parameters.description: The IP address for which to retrieve resolutions

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: String representing a page of results

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: The number of files to return in the response. Default is 1000
